title: vvp_reg.py: Allow to omit empty gold files
body:
vvp_reg.py requires 4 gold files. One for each of stdout and stderr of both iverilog and vvp. Most of these log files will be empty for most test cases. This will result in a lot of empty files being added to the repository.

If a gold file for a specific output stream can not be found assume that the output stream is supposed to empty. This allows to omit the empty gold files.

Also remove all the existing empty gold files.
